response.justification: Strong senior engineer with 13+ years across web, embedded, and open-source ecosystems, including Linux/Unix work, an active open-source GIS platform, and solid architecture exposure. However, the role demands C1 German and explicit leadership/team-lead experience, and the resume shows only basic German and individual-contributor titles without formal team-lead or head-of-development tenure. UML modeling and Python are also not evidenced.
strengths: Extensive full-stack and systems experience with strong open-source and Linux background
Founder of an active open-source platform showing architecture, ops, and product ownership
Proven mentorship/teaching track record via workshops, dojos, and Selenium course
concerns: German listed as basic — far below the required C1 level
No explicit head-of-development or formal team-lead role on resume
Python and UML not listed among skills despite being desired/required
